name: MAXX-XMD WhatsApp Bot
description: The most powerful WhatsApp multi-device bot with 580+ commands. Deploy in one click.

SESSION_ID.description: MAXX-XMD SESSION ID. Get it from https://pair.maxxtech.co.ke

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Your WhatsApp number with country code (e.g. 254700000000). Optional — if not set, the bot treats itself as the owner.

WORK_MODE.description: Bot mode: public (everyone can use) or private (owner only)

AUTO_TYPING.description: Show typing indicator when the bot is processing a command

AUTO_VIEW_STATUS.description: Automatically view status updates from contacts

AUTO_LIKE_STATUS.description: Automatically like status updates from contacts

WELCOME_MSG.description: Send a welcome message when a new member joins a group

HEROKU_API_KEY.description: Your Heroku API key — enables the .update command to auto-update the bot from WhatsApp. Get it from: heroku.com/account/applications

HEROKU_APP_NAME.description: Your Heroku app name (e.g. my-maxx-bot) — required for .update command auto-updates

NPM_CONFIG_PRODUCTION.description: Keep all bot packages after build — do not change this value

NODE_MODULES_CACHE.description: Disable build cache for clean installs — do not change this value

AUTO_REACT.description: Auto react to messages with emojis

ANTI_SPAM.description: Detect and warn spammers in groups
